tripOverview.intro: San Juan captivates with its colorful colonial architecture, pristine beaches, and vibrant culture. This Caribbean gem offers the perfect blend of historic charm and tropical romance for unforgettable beach days.
tripOverview.vibe: A perfect mix of historic exploration, beach relaxation, and romantic moments in one of the Caribbean's most welcoming destinations.

destinationOverview.bestTime: April offers perfect weather with warm temperatures, lower humidity, and minimal rainfall - ideal for beach activities and exploring.

attractions.name: Old San Juan
attractions.desc: Colorful colonial streets with historic forts and charming architecture.

attractions.name: El Yunque Rainforest
attractions.desc: Tropical paradise with waterfalls and hiking trails.

attractions.name: Condado Beach
attractions.desc: Popular beach with clear waters and beachfront dining.

destinationOverview.transportation: San Juan offers reliable public buses (AMA) connecting major areas for $0.75 per ride. Taxis are readily available but negotiate fares beforehand, while Uber operates throughout the metro area. Rental cars are ideal for exploring beyond the city but parking in Old San Juan can be challenging.
destinationOverview.tip: Use ride-sharing apps for transparent pricing and always carry cash for public transportation - stay in well-lit tourist areas after dark.
destinationOverview.safety: San Juan is generally safe for tourists, especially in main tourist zones, but remain aware of your surroundings and secure valuables.
destinationOverview.airaloText: Stay connected with affordable eSIM data plans that work seamlessly across Puerto Rico without roaming charges.

days.intro: Begin your romantic getaway exploring the colorful cobblestone streets and historic charm of Old San Juan.

morning.name: Arrival & Hotel Check-in
morning.desc: Settle into your accommodation and freshen up.

morning.name: Castillo San Felipe del Morro
morning.desc: Explore this impressive 16th-century fortress with ocean views.

afternoon.name: Old San Juan Walking Tour
afternoon.desc: Wander through colorful streets discovering historic sites and architecture.

afternoon.name: Paseo de la Princesa
afternoon.desc: Stroll along this romantic waterfront promenade.

evening.name: Sunset at San Juan Gate
evening.desc: Watch the sunset through this iconic colonial gateway.

evening.name: Welcome Dinner
evening.desc: Enjoy traditional Puerto Rican cuisine at a romantic restaurant.

days.tip: Wear comfortable walking shoes for cobblestone streets and bring a light jacket for evening ocean breezes.

days.intro: Spend a perfect beach day at Condado with crystal clear waters and beachfront relaxation.

morning.name: Coffee & Pastries
morning.desc: Start with fresh coffee and local pastries.

morning.name: Condado Beach Setup
morning.desc: Rent beach chairs and umbrellas for the day.

afternoon.name: Beach Time & Swimming
afternoon.desc: Relax on golden sand and swim in turquoise waters.

afternoon.name: Beachfront Lunch
afternoon.desc: Enjoy fresh seafood with ocean views.

afternoon.name: Water Sports
afternoon.desc: Try paddleboarding or kayaking together.

evening.name: Beach Sunset
evening.desc: Watch a romantic sunset from the beach.

days.tip: Apply sunscreen regularly and stay hydrated - the Caribbean sun is stronger than it appears.

days.intro: Discover the magic of Puerto Rico's tropical rainforest with waterfalls and lush hiking trails.

morning.name: Early Breakfast
morning.desc: Fuel up with a hearty breakfast before your adventure.

morning.name: El Yunque National Forest
morning.desc: Guided tour through tropical rainforest with waterfall stops.

afternoon.name: La Mina Falls
afternoon.desc: Swim in natural pools at this stunning waterfall.

afternoon.name: Yokahú Tower
afternoon.desc: Climb this observation tower for panoramic forest views.

afternoon.name: Return Journey
afternoon.desc: Relaxing drive back through scenic mountain roads.

evening.name: Rest & Refresh
evening.desc: Return to hotel to clean up after your adventure.

evening.name: Casual Dinner
evening.desc: Enjoy comfort food at a local favorite restaurant.

days.tip: Bring water shoes for waterfall swimming and pack a waterproof bag for electronics.

days.intro: Unwind at beautiful Isla Verde beach with its white sand and excellent swimming conditions.

morning.name: Beach Coffee
morning.desc: Start with coffee overlooking the ocean.

morning.name: Isla Verde Beach
morning.desc: Relax on pristine white sand with calm waters.

afternoon.name: Beachside Lunch
afternoon.desc: Fresh vegetarian options with ocean views.

afternoon.name: Beach Activities
afternoon.desc: Volleyball, snorkeling, or simply sunbathing.

afternoon.name: Couples Massage
afternoon.desc: Relaxing beachside massage for two.

evening.name: Golden Hour Photos
evening.desc: Capture romantic moments during golden hour.

evening.name: Beachfront Dinner
evening.desc: Romantic dinner with live music and ocean breeze.

days.tip: Book spa services in advance and ask about vegetarian menu options at beachfront restaurants.

days.intro: Dive deep into Puerto Rican culture through art, music, and local neighborhoods.

morning.name: Santurce Street Art Tour
morning.desc: Discover vibrant murals and urban art in this creative district.

morning.name: Mercado de Río Piedras
morning.desc: Experience local market culture and tropical fruits.

afternoon.name: Traditional Lunch
afternoon.desc: Authentic vegetarian Puerto Rican cuisine.

afternoon.name: Casa Blanca Museum
afternoon.desc: Explore this historic house museum with gardens.

afternoon.name: La Fortaleza Tour
afternoon.desc: Tour the governor's mansion and UNESCO World Heritage site.

evening.name: La Placita Santurce
evening.desc: Experience the famous nightlife square with live music.

evening.name: Salsa Dancing
evening.desc: Learn to dance salsa at an LGBTQ+-friendly venue.

days.tip: Learn a few Spanish phrases to connect with locals and always ask about vegetarian options.

days.intro: Take a day trip to Culebra Island to experience one of the world's most beautiful beaches.

morning.name: Early Departure
morning.desc: Ferry or flight to Culebra Island for the day.

morning.name: Flamenco Beach Arrival
morning.desc: Arrive at the world-renowned Flamenco Beach.

afternoon.name: Beach Paradise
afternoon.desc: Swim in crystal-clear waters and relax on white sand.

afternoon.name: Beach Picnic
afternoon.desc: Enjoy a packed lunch on the beach.

afternoon.name: Snorkeling Adventure
afternoon.desc: Explore colorful coral reefs and tropical fish.

evening.name: Return Journey
evening.desc: Ferry back to San Juan with sunset views.

evening.name: Late Dinner
evening.desc: Casual dinner back in San Juan after your island adventure.

days.tip: Bring reef-safe sunscreen, snorkel gear, and plenty of water for this full-day island adventure.

days.intro: End your romantic getaway with unforgettable sunset views and a special farewell dinner.

morning.name: Leisurely Breakfast
morning.desc: Enjoy a relaxed final breakfast together.

morning.name: Last-Minute Shopping
morning.desc: Pick up souvenirs and local coffee to take home.

afternoon.name: Final Beach Time
afternoon.desc: One last swim at your favorite beach.

afternoon.name: Spa Treatment
afternoon.desc: Couples relaxation before your farewell dinner.

afternoon.name: Hotel Preparation
afternoon.desc: Get ready for your romantic farewell evening.

evening.name: Sunset Sail
evening.desc: Romantic catamaran cruise with champagne and sunset.

evening.name: Farewell Dinner
evening.desc: Special romantic dinner at San Juan's finest restaurant.

evening.name: Nightcap
evening.desc: Final drinks at a rooftop bar with city views.

days.tip: Make dinner reservations well in advance and consider packing beach clothes separately for easy airport travel.

food.intro: San Juan's culinary scene blends traditional Puerto Rican flavors with international influences, offering excellent vegetarian options.
food.tip: Most restaurants offer vegetarian options, but always ask about ingredients as some dishes may contain meat-based broths.

neighborhoods.name: Old San Juan
neighborhoods.desc: Historic cobblestone streets with colonial charm and cultural attractions.
neighborhoods.whyStay: Walkable to major sights with authentic atmosphere.

neighborhoods.name: Condado
neighborhoods.desc: Upscale beachfront area with resorts, shopping, and nightlife.
neighborhoods.whyStay: Perfect balance of beach and urban sophistication.

neighborhoods.name: Isla Verde
neighborhoods.desc: Modern hotel district near the airport with beautiful beaches.
neighborhoods.whyStay: Easy airport access with pristine beach location.

hotels.tip: Book accommodations with kitchenettes to prepare vegetarian meals and save money on dining.

getYourGuide.name: El Yunque Rainforest Adventure Tour
getYourGuide.desc: Full-day guided hike with waterfalls, natural pools, and tropical wildlife spotting.

getYourGuide.name: Old San Juan Food & Culture Tour
getYourGuide.desc: Walking tour combining historic sites with traditional Puerto Rican cuisine tastings.

getYourGuide.name: Bioluminescent Bay Kayak Tour
getYourGuide.desc: Night kayaking experience in glowing waters with expert guides and equipment provided.

hiddenGems.name: La Chiva Natural Pool
hiddenGems.desc: Secret swimming hole in Vieques accessible by short hike.

hiddenGems.name: Cueva de las Maravillas
hiddenGems.desc: Stunning cave system with underground rivers and formations.

hiddenGems.name: Paseo Tablado La Guancha
hiddenGems.desc: Local boardwalk in Ponce with authentic food and sunset views.

packing.title: April in San Juan
packing.intro: April offers perfect weather with warm temperatures, minimal rainfall, and comfortable breezes - ideal for beach activities and exploration.
packing.luggage: A medium suitcase plus carry-on should accommodate everything for your week-long romantic getaway.
packing.tip: Pack reef-safe sunscreen to protect marine life and bring a reusable water bottle to stay hydrated in the tropical climate.

bookTrip.intro: Round-trip flights from Philadelphia to San Juan typically cost $400-600 per person in April.
